author: JungyupLee
name: PR #2135 stack + MP3 marker-pair fusion (non-record)
blurb: Post-deadline note documenting that the MP3 marker-pair fusion from our prior PR #2109 composes with PR #2135's stack. Single addition: three 2-grams [SPACE,TITLE]/[SPACE,ALLCAPS]/[SPACE,CAPNEXT] fused into alias donor tokens (8/9/10) on already-tokenized CaseOps shards (tokenizer unchanged), with a norm-matched embedding warm-init at training start. SmearGate dampening branch present in the patched train_gpt.py is hard-disabled (alias_dampening_active=False), so PR #2135's forward path is otherwise identical. 3-seed phased TTT val_bpb 1.05559 (std 0.00018) on canonical CaseOps SP8192. Filed under track_non_record_16mb for method-contribution reference only — not eligible for chronological standing.
technique_summary: PR #2135 stack with MP3 marker-pair fusion added (3 alias donor tokens + norm-matched embedding warm-init). SmearGate dampening branch hard-disabled.
note: Post-deadline submission (May 5 vs May 1 cutoff). Validation uses canonical CaseOps SP8192 split rebuilt from the marker_pair_v3 stream-edit (val_tokens 43,767,808; val_bytes sum 151,546,741 vs canonical caseops_v1_reserved 151,568,749 — 0.015% delta from edge cases at chunk/doc boundaries). md5 train_gpt.py = c90dba41e5ce9586871a05e94e6e7445.
